title: Loud (Part 3)
speaker: Antwan Cronje
summary: The core premise of this series is that whatever is loudest in your life right now is running the show, and for Christians, we want Jesus's voice to be the loudest. The main idea is that you win the battle by starving, but you win the war by feeding, as the real battle is in the mind where wrong voices are often fed while the right ones starve.
quotes: One verse wins a battle. Consistent feeding wins the war.
What you feed up here, controls everything out there.
You can only retrieve what you already deposited.
